description_long: This house is a single-story, modern residential structure set within a fenced yard, featuring two large pavilion-style roofs and a variety of outdoor amenities. The property includes a rectangular swimming pool, multiple lounge and dining areas with umbrellas, and a landscaped garden with trees and shrubs. The perimeter is enclosed by a tall, solid fence, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. The main house structure is complemented by paved walkways, green lawns, and shaded seating zones. The design emphasizes outdoor living, with ample space for relaxation and social gatherings. The overall aesthetic is clean, contemporary, and functional, with a focus on open-air comfort.
description: A modern, single-story house with pavilion roofs, a pool, and landscaped outdoor living areas, all enclosed by a tall privacy fence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry, two pavilion roofs, a pool to the left, and dense trees along the fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the pool, shaded lounge chairs, and a large tree near the center, with umbrellas and outdoor seating visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the garden, paved walkways, and a clear view of the pool and shaded seating areas under umbrellas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the two pavilion roofs, a tree in the foreground, and the pool with its access steps.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry under a pavilion roof, with a paved path, no visible steps, and minimalistic modern styling.
